message:
fix(tests): widen streaming timeout test timing margins for CI

The exec streaming timeout test used a 20ms timeout with a 250ms
sleep, leaving only ~230ms margin which is too tight under CI load.
Widen to 200ms timeout with a 10s sleep so the timeout always fires
well before the process exits, regardless of machine speed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
